name: 情敵三角（備胎竹馬×霸總丈夫）
name_en: Love Triangle (Childhood Friend Rival × CEO Husband)
description: 青梅竹馬Chumo回國後追求女主，引發霸總丈夫的醋意大爆發。製造甜蜜與緊張並存的戲劇效果，讓觀眾看到男主的佔有慾和深情。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I've been into Goun for 10 years. Why'd this older guy get to her first? / I just don't want to see you with him. / I did it on purpose. If you ever try to get close to my wife again, I won't be so polite next time.
examples.context: 青梅竹馬Chumo回國後追求女主，引發霸總丈夫的醋意大爆發。製造甜蜜與緊張並存的戲劇效果，讓觀眾看到男主的佔有慾和深情。
